movie.synopsis: Valavara (2026) Amid the misty hills of Sakleshpur, Karnataka, Valavaara unfolds as a sweeping coming-of-age drama about brotherhood, loyalty, and the weight of responsibility. Kundeshi, a quiet boy from a struggling farming family, has always lived in the shadow of his younger brother, Kosudi – their father’s clear favorite. When the boys take their pregnant cow out to graze, it vanishes into the countryside and tramples a neighbor’s field, setting off a desperate search.
